case_title: WILLIAM DUGOVIC VS. MARIA OLIVIERA RAMOS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF,AMENDING CLAIM TO DISMISS DEFENDANT MARIA OLIVIERA RAMOS AND ADD DEFENDANT PATEL NASIER DBA MARCONI HOTEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUGOVIC, VILIAM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUGOVIC, VILIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMOS, MARIA OLIVIERA NASIER, PATEL DBA MARCONI HOTEL DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS DAMAGES FROM BEDBUGS IN HIS ROOM. DEFENDANT CONTENDS THAT PLAINTIFF REFUSED TO ALLOW THE PEST CONTROL OPERATOR ACCESS TO HIS ROOM. PLAINTIFF ADMITTED THAT HE REFUSED ACCESS TO THE PEST CONTROL OPERATOR. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN HIS BURNED OF PROOF ON ALL ISSUES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DUGOVIC, VILIAM AS TO DEFENDANT NASIER, PATEL DBA MARCONI HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DISMISSAL AS TO MARIA OLIVIERA RAMOS **ONLY** FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUGOVIC, VILIAM AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, MARIA OLIVIERA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUGOVIC, VILIAM ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NASIER, PATEL DBA MARCONI HOTEL
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-07-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 505
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DUGOVIC, VILIAM AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, MARIA OLIVIERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COURT TRIAL ON JUL-07-2009 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2009 - SMALL CLAIMS RE-ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-07-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 505, JUDGE JOHN STEWART. (206)

COURT TRIAL ON JUL-07-2009 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUL-07-2009 BY JOHN K. STEWART. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM PLAINTIFF ONLY RETAINED (505).

AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-07-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 505

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HELD TUESDAY, JUL-07-2009, AT 10:30 A.M.:
WILLIAM DUGOVIC, PLAINTIFF, MR. NASSIR PATEL, DEFENDANT, BOTH PARTIES APPEAR AFTER BEING ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 505 BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE, DEPT. 206. PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM JUDGE IN DEPT. 506 THIS DAY. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO BOTH SIDES.

THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AFTER REVIEWING THE FILE IN CHAMBERS, AND HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH PLAINTIFF WILLIAM DUGOVIC, FOLLOWED BY HEARING ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY DEFENDANT MR. NASSIR PATEL.
